notes: After installing with default settings, I get an error saying "Missing game executable: /home/deck/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/KonoSuba God's Blessing on this Wonderful World! I tried making a softlink called game.exe to the executable file that does exist in the game folder, but then it complains about a GameData/ folder being missing instead. The game files don't seem to be arranged/named the way the game expects when running on Steam Deck.
title: KONOSUBA - God's Blessing on this Wonderful World! Love For These Clothes Of Desire!
